# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

# Chart.yaml
apiVersion: v2
name: microservices-stack
description: A Helm chart for microservices stack deployment
type: application
version: 1.0.0
appVersion: "1.0.0"

---
# values.yaml
global:
  registry: docker.io
  imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent

frontend:
  name: frontend
  replicaCount: 2
  image:
    repository: myorg/frontend
    tag: "1.0.0"
  service:
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
  resources:
    limits:
      cpu: 500m
      memory: 512Mi
    requests:
      cpu: 250m
      memory: 256Mi
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 10000
    fsGroup: 10000
    allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
    readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
    capabilities:
      drop:
        - ALL
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault

backend:
  name: backend
  replicaCount: 3
  image:
    repository: myorg/backend
    tag: "1.0.0"
  service:
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
  resources:
    limits:
      cpu: 1000m
      memory: 1Gi
    requests:
      cpu: 500m
      memory: 512Mi
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 10000
    fsGroup: 10000
    allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
    readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
    capabilities:
      drop:
        - ALL
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault

database:
  name: database
  replicaCount: 1
  image:
    repository: myorg/database
    tag: "1.0.0"
  service:
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
  persistence:
    enabled: true
    size: 10Gi
    storageClass: standard
  resources:
    limits:
      cpu: 2000m
      memory: 2Gi
    requests:
      cpu: 1000m
      memory: 1Gi
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 999
    fsGroup: 999
    allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
    readOnlyRootFilesystem: false
    capabilities:
      drop:
        - ALL
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault

cache:
  name: cache
  replicaCount: 1
  image:
    repository: myorg/redis
    tag: "7.0"
  service:
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
  resources:
    limits:
      cpu: 500m
      memory: 512Mi
    requests:
      cpu: 250m
      memory: 256Mi
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 999
    fsGroup: 999
    allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
    readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
    capabilities:
      drop:
        - ALL
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault

---
# templates/frontend-deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.frontend.name }}
  labels:
    app: {{ .Values.frontend.name }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.frontend.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Values.frontend.name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Values.frontend.name }}
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: {{ .Values.frontend.securityContext.runAsUser }}
        fsGroup: {{ .Values.frontend.securityContext.fsGroup }}
        seccompProfile:
          type: {{ .Values.frontend.securityContext.seccompProfile.type }}
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      containers:
      - name: {{ .Values.frontend.name }}
        image: "{{ .Values.global.registry }}/{{ .Values.frontend.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.frontend.image.tag }}"
        imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.global.imagePullPolicy }}
        ports:
        - containerPort: {{ .Values.frontend.service.targetPort }}
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: {{ .Values.frontend.resources.limits.cpu }}
            memory: {{ .Values.frontend.resources.limits.memory }}
          requests:
            cpu: {{ .Values.frontend.resources.requests.cpu }}
            memory: {{ .Values.frontend.resources.requests.memory }}
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: {{ .Values.frontend.securityContext.allowPrivilegeEscalation }}
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: {{ .Values.frontend.securityContext.readOnlyRootFilesystem }}
          runAsNonRoot: {{ .Values.frontend.securityContext.runAsNonRoot }}
          capabilities:
            drop:
            {{- range .Values.frontend.securityContext.capabilities.drop }}
            - {{ . }}
            {{- end }}
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: cache
          mountPath: /app/cache
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: {{ .Values.frontend.service.targetPort }}
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: {{ .Values.frontend.service.targetPort }}
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: cache
        emptyDir: {}

---
# templates/frontend-service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.frontend.name }}
  labels:
    app: {{ .Values.frontend.name }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.frontend.service.type }}
  ports:
  - port: {{ .Values.frontend.service.port }}
    targetPort: {{ .Values.frontend.service.targetPort }}
    protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: {{ .Values.frontend.name }}

---
# templates/backend-deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.backend.name }}
  labels:
    app: {{ .Values.backend.name }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.backend.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Values.backend.name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Values.backend.name }}
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: {{ .Values.backend.securityContext.runAsUser }}
        fsGroup: {{ .Values.backend.securityContext.fsGroup }}
        seccompProfile:
          type: {{ .Values.backend.securityContext.seccompProfile.type }}
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      containers:
      - name: {{ .Values.backend.name }}
        image: "{{ .Values.global.registry }}/{{ .Values.backend.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.backend.image.tag }}"
        imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.global.imagePullPolicy }}
        ports:
        - containerPort: {{ .Values.backend.service.targetPort }}
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: {{ .Values.backend.resources.limits.cpu }}
            memory: {{ .Values.backend.resources.limits.memory }}
          requests:
            cpu: {{ .Values.backend.resources.requests.cpu }}
            memory: {{ .Values.backend.resources.requests.memory }}
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: {{ .Values.backend.securityContext.allowPrivilegeEscalation }}
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: {{ .Values.backend.securityContext.readOnlyRootFilesystem }}
          runAsNonRoot: {{ .Values.backend.securityContext.runAsNonRoot }}
          capabilities:
            drop:
            {{- range .Values.backend.securityContext.capabilities.drop }}
            - {{ . }}
            {{- end }}
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: logs
          mountPath: /app/logs
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: {{ .Values.backend.service.targetPort }}
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: {{ .Values.backend.service.targetPort }}
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: logs
        emptyDir: {}

---
# templates/backend-service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.backend.name }}
  labels:
    app: {{ .Values.backend.name }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.backend.service.type }}
  ports:
  - port: {{ .Values.backend.service.port }}
    targetPort: {{ .Values.backend.service.targetPort }}
    protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: {{ .Values.backend.name }}

---
# templates/database-statefulset.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.database.name }}
  labels:
    app: {{ .Values.database.name }}
spec:
  serviceName: {{ .Values.database.name }}
  replicas: {{ .Values.database.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Values.database.name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Values.database.name }}
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: {{ .Values.database.securityContext.runAsUser }}
        fsGroup: {{ .Values.database.securityContext.fsGroup }}
        seccompProfile:
          type: {{ .Values.database.securityContext.seccompProfile.type }}
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      containers:
      - name: {{ .Values.database.name }}
        image: "{{ .Values.global.registry }}/{{ .Values.database.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.database.image.tag }}"
        imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.global.imagePullPolicy }}
        ports:
        - containerPort: {{ .Values.database.service.targetPort }}
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: {{ .Values.database.resources.limits.cpu }}
            memory: {{ .Values.database.resources.limits.memory }}
          requests:
            cpu: {{ .Values.database.resources.requests.cpu }}
            memory: {{ .Values.database.resources.requests.memory }}
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: {{ .Values.database.securityContext.allowPrivilegeEscalation }}
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: {{ .Values.database.securityContext.readOnlyRootFilesystem }}
          runAsNonRoot: {{ .Values.database.securityContext.runAsNonRoot }}
          capabilities:
            drop:
            {{- range .Values.database.securityContext.capabilities.drop }}
            - {{ . }}
            {{- end }}
        volumeMounts:
        - name: data
          mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        livenessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: {{ .Values.database.service.targetPort }}
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: {{ .Values.database.service.targetPort }}
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
  {{- if .Values.database.persistence.enabled }}
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - metadata:
      name: data
    spec:
      accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
      storageClassName: {{ .Values.database.persistence.storageClass }}
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: {{ .Values.database.persistence.size }}
  {{- end }}

---
# templates/database-service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.database.name }}
  labels:
    app: {{ .Values.database.name }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.database.service.type }}
  clusterIP: None
  ports:
  - port: {{ .Values.database.service.port }}
    targetPort: {{ .Values.database.service.targetPort }}
    protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: {{ .Values.database.name }}

---
# templates/cache-deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.cache.name }}
  labels:
    app: {{ .Values.cache.name }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.cache.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Values.cache.name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Values.cache.name }}
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: {{ .Values.cache.securityContext.runAsUser }}
        fsGroup: {{ .Values.cache.securityContext.fsGroup }}
        seccompProfile:
          type: {{ .Values.cache.securityContext.seccompProfile.type }}
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      containers:
      - name: {{ .Values.cache.name }}
        image: "{{ .Values.global.registry }}/{{ .Values.cache.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.cache.image.tag }}"
        imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.global.imagePullPolicy }}
        ports:
        - containerPort: {{ .Values.cache.service.targetPort }}
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: {{ .Values.cache.resources.limits.cpu }}
            memory: {{ .Values.cache.resources.limits.memory }}
          requests:
            cpu: {{ .Values.cache.resources.requests.cpu }}
            memory: {{ .Values.cache.resources.requests.memory }}
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: {{ .Values.cache.securityContext.allowPrivilegeEscalation }}
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: {{ .Values.cache.securityContext.readOnlyRootFilesystem }}
          runAsNonRoot: {{ .Values.cache.securityContext.runAsNonRoot }}
          capabilities:
            drop:
            {{- range .Values.cache.securityContext.capabilities.drop }}
            - {{ . }}
            {{- end }}
        volumeMounts:
        - name: data
          mountPath: /data
        livenessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: {{ .Values.cache.service.targetPort }}
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: {{ .Values.cache.service.targetPort }}
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
      volumes:
      - name: data
        emptyDir: {}

---
# templates/cache-service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.cache.name }}
  labels:
    app: {{ .Values.cache.name }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.cache.service.type }}
  ports:
  - port: {{ .Values.cache.service.port }}
    targetPort: {{ .Values.cache.service.targetPort }}
    protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: {{ .Values.cache.name }}

---
# templates/networkpolicy.yaml
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-network-policy
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - podSelector: {}
  egress:
  - to:
    - podSelector: {}
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 53
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53
